name: File Download Via Bitsadmin
notes:
This rule detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Michael Haag, FPT.EagleEye
SIGMA Title: File Download Via Bitsadmin
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of bitsadmin.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%transfer%' or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%http%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%create%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%addfile%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY File Download Via Bitsadmin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of bitsadmin.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%transfer%' or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%http%' and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%create%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%addfile%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: File Download Via Bitsadmin
Event description: Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
